steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The farm-size transition hypothesis predicts that modernization leads to consolidation into larger farms. The question asks which choice shows that Promkhambut et al.'s findings about Thailand weaken that prediction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — a vague or unspecific finding: Doesn't clearly state what the hypothesis predicts or show it failed in Thailand. ✗
  • Choice B — Thai farms expanded: Misrepresents the source — Promkhambut et al. found farms stayed small, not that they grew. ✗
  • Choice C — ignores Thailand: Doesn't engage with the Thai evidence that would challenge the hypothesis. ✗
  • Choice D — Thai farms modernized but stayed small: States the hypothesis's prediction (shift to large-scale farming) and shows it didn't happen — Thai farms adopted modern methods while remaining small, per Promkhambut et al. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
